headline: Vena says UP, NS have capacity to handle merger-related growth
summary: Union Pacific CEO Jim Vena said his railroad will have capacity to manage growth from the proposed merger with Norfolk Southern, since UP has slashed the number of trains it operates on its system by 24% since 2019. The post Vena says UP, NS have capacity to handle merger-related growth appeared first on FreightWaves.

headline: The Retirement System Is Breaking - 3 Smart Moves To Protect Yourself
summary: Retirement faces unprecedented risks like unfavorable demographics, social security cuts, inflation, taxation, and equity market concentration. Read what investors need to know.

headline: How Evercore’s Upgrade and Merger Optimism At Union Pacific (UNP) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: Earlier in March 2026, Evercore ISI upgraded Union Pacific Corporation after its presentation at the JPMorgan Industrials Conference, highlighting the railroad’s strong volume trends, margins, and relative valuation, alongside a pending merger application that could reshape its operations. Separately, Union Pacific’s plans for high‑profile commemorative locomotives and a Big Boy steam tour to the East Coast underscore the brand’s national visibility and public engagement at a time when...
